HGSS.690.0001:
The same opponent, the same Pokémon,
but the battle results are different\r
every time!\f
I’d like to battle with you again.
Let’s trade phone numbers![0200,0000]
HGSS.690.0002:
Once I’ve gotten ready, I’ll give you
a call!
HGSS.690.0003:
I see... Well, that’s fine by me.
I’ve always got my mountain!
HGSS.690.0004:
I’d like to battle with you again.
Let’s exchange numbers! [0200,0000]
HGSS.690.0005:
That’s strange...
I can hear your voice so clearly...\f
Wait, you’re nearby, aren’t you!
Let’s talk in person!
HGSS.690.0006:
Pokémon easily develop an affection for
us nature-loving Hikers!\f
No, no, it’s not just my imagination!
I’ve got proof! Seriously, my\r
[0100,000A,0000] never disobeys me!
HGSS.690.0007:
Hey, listen up!\f
Yesterday, I ran into a wild
[0100,000B,0000]! Just out in nature!\f
Of course, my Pokémon were in top form
for the battle. It was great.\r
It all happened so naturally!\f
How do I describe this wonderful
feeling... How do I put it into words?\r
Well, for now, how about...\f
HOOOORAY!
HGSS.690.0008:
A few days ago, while I was hiking in the
mountains, a wild [0100,000B,0000]\r
suddenly jumped out at me.\f
I was completely unprepared for the
experience, and it ran away.\f
It’s said we Hikers stake our life on
being prepared for anything, so I have\r
to count this as a failure as a Hiker!
HGSS.690.0009:
We absolutely must have another 
battle together!\r
That’s why we’re speaking right now!\f
Am I right? I hope I am!
I’ll be waiting on [0104,0003,0000]!
HGSS.690.0010:
We’re having a battle on
[0104,0003,0000], remember. I’m out\r
here, waiting in the midst of nature!
HGSS.690.0011:
That’s right... I’m up on this mountain
almost the whole year round...\f
Baths?\f
There’s no such thing on a mountain!\f
Instead, I just look for a flowing
river, and wash myself off in that.\f
That’s right! A few days ago, when
I was bathing in the river, someone\r
mistook me for a Swimmer♂!
